title: A5. Vasseur Pressure Exponent Sharpness

task_text:
Solve this Super-Eywa grading-bank question.
Question ID: atlas-derived-A5-vasseur-pressure-exponent-sharpness
Title: A5. Vasseur Pressure Exponent Sharpness

Question:
Can the De Giorgi recurrence exponent beta = 4/3 be improved for 3D Navier-Stokes?

Grading target:
Binary:

- correct conclusion
- extremizer construction
- identification that all 8 alternative routes are blocked

Return format:
FINAL_ANSWER: <your answer>
JUSTIFICATION: <brief justification>
root_result_excerpt:
FINAL_ANSWER: No
JUSTIFICATION: Recent mathematical developments, specifically the work related to the sharpness of the De Giorgi recurrence exponent in the context of the 3D Navier-Stokes equations, have demonstrated that the exponent beta = 4/3 cannot be improved. This is established by showing that all potential alternative routes to improve the exponent are blocked and by the construction of e
